title: ayenia geminifolia
intro: Ayenia geminifolia, also known as "False Poinciana" or "Milk Tree", is a plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering health benefits such as pain relief and wound healing. Ayenia geminifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
